author: n1az
description: Display JSON data as collapsible trees in your notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Niaz Morshed
manifest.description: Display JSON data as collapsible trees in your notes.
manifest.name: JSON Collapsible

name: JSON Collapsible

releases.author: n1az
releases.description: I have been struggling to work with long JSON structures in my notes, and looked for solutions. Then I created this simple plugin that turns JSON into collapsible like many JSON viewer. I hope it help others.
releases.name: Initial Release
